creator: aksyom@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD leno 10.2-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p7 #0: Mon Nov  2 14:19:39 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Installed www/xombrero from FreeBSD-latest repository.

After starting www/xombrero, it runs for a few seconds and then core dumps.

Core file: http://koti.kapsi.fi/~isoa/cores/xombrero-bin.core.xz

Suggestion: if you cannot fix this within a reasonable time frame, please mark the port broken or remove it. The ports collection is full of broken apps as it is.
